description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in phpFFL 1.24 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the PHPFFL_FILE_ROOT parameter to (1) admin.php, (2) custom_pages.php, (3) draft.php, (4) faq.php, (5) leagues.php, (6) livedraft.php, (7) login.php, (8) my_team.php, (9) profile.php, (10) signup.php, (11) statistics.php, (12) transactions.php, (13) program_files/admin/custom_pages.php, or (14) program_files/common.php.  NOTE: the program_files/livedraft/admin.php and program_files/livedraft/livedraft.php vectors are covered by CVE-2007-4934.
